program.program_name_th: สถาปัตยกรรมศาสตรบัณฑิต สาขาวิชาสถาปัตยกรรมภายใน (หลักสูตรนานาชาติ) ปริญญาตรี 5 ปี
program.major_name_th: สถาปัตยกรรมภายใน (หลักสูตรนานาชาติ) - สถ.บ. 5 ปี
program.project_name_th: รอบที่ 3 แอดมิชชั่น (Admission) ปีการศึกษา 2568

rounds.project_name_th: รอบที่ 1 โครงการ Pre-U KMUTT ปีการศึกษา 2569
rounds.description: หลักสูตรสถาปัตยกรรมศาสตรบัณฑิต สาขาวิชาสถาปัตยกรรมภายใน (หลักสูตรนานาชาติ)
rounds.condition:
1.Report of English Proficiency Test from TOEFL, IELTS, CU-TEP, RMIT, TOEIC or CEFR
** Remarks:
• English Proficiency Test accepted by SoA+D are as follow: TOEFL (ibt) = 61, IELTS = 5,CU-TEP = 61 or RMIT = Upper Intermediate (5), TOEIC = 605 or CEFR 51: B2
• For those who get the scores with IELTS – 4.5, TOEFL (ibt) – 53-60, CU-TEP – 53-60, RMIT = Intermediate (4.5), TOEIC=540-604 or CEFR 41-50: B1 can submit the application form and take the aptitude and interview test. If the students are accepted, they are required to study English Course in May - June.
To take the RMIT English Test, students may directly apply at the RMIT office located on the 3rd floor of Major Avenue Ratchayothin. Please contact 0-2930-3570 or Line ID: rmitenglishth
2. Personal Statement
Personal statement must be able to demonstrate the following:
• Your motivation to study – Why you decide to apply for the program and why you choose SoA+D, or KMUTT.
• Your expectation from the study – How the study can accommodate your future career plan or other things you would like to achieve after graduation.
3. Portfolio Content
• Your basic skills or spatial comprehension– sketching, drawing, painting, printmaking, model making, or photographic work. Minimum of 5 pieces
• Your ideas/ works are related to the discipline of study (architecture, interior architecture, landscape architecture, design innovation and communication design). Minimum of 5 pieces
rounds.interview_location: มหาวิทยาลัยเทคโนโลยีพระจอมเกล้าธนบุรี (มจธ.)

2. Personal Statement

3. Portfolio Content

• Your ideas/ works are related to the discipline of study (architecture, interior architecture, industrial design and communication design). Minimum of 5 pieces

rounds.project_name_th: รอบที่ 1 โครงการ Active Recruitment สำหรับผู้มีศักยภาพ ปีการศึกษา 2569
rounds.project_name_en: Round 1 Active Recruitment for Gifted Students 2026
rounds.description: หลักสูตรสถาปัตยกรรมศาสตรบัณฑิต สาขาวิชาสถาปัตยกรรมภายใน (หลักสูตรนานาชาติ)
rounds.condition:
1.Report of English Proficiency Test from TOEFL, IELTS, CU-TEP, RMIT, TOEIC or CEFR
** Remarks:
• English Proficiency Test accepted by SoA+D are as follow: TOEFL (ibt) = 61, IELTS = 5,CU-TEP = 61 or RMIT = Upper Intermediate (5), TOEIC = 605 or CEFR 51: B2
• For those who get the scores with IELTS – 4.5, TOEFL (ibt) – 53-60, CU-TEP – 53-60, RMIT = Intermediate (4.5), TOEIC=540-604 or CEFR 41-50: B1 can submit the application form and take the aptitude and interview test. If the students are accepted, they are required to study English Course in May - June.
To take the RMIT English Test, students may directly apply at the RMIT office located on the 3rd floor of Major Avenue Ratchayothin. Please contact 0-2930-3570 or Line ID: rmitenglishth
2. Personal statement in video format. Maximum 5 minutes.
What do you plan for yourself and how studying at MIDI could help you achieve your goal. How is your goal aligned with MIDI’s program objectives?
Video file must be saved in .mov, .mp4, .avi format.
Total file size must not exceed 20 MB
3. E-Portfolio Content 
1) Personal Profile
2) Five to eight pieces of selected works including one, and/or more than one, of the following areas of interest.
o Art and creative works – including sketches, paintings, photography, models, drawings, animation, film, digital artwork.
o Scientific projects – including photos of work and a concise description
o Business projects – including photos of work and a concise description
rounds.interview_location: มหาวิทยาลัยเทคโนโลยีพระจอมเกล้าธนบุรี (มจธ.)
